option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <layer-list xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">
<!-- Soft blue shadow pushed slightly down --> <item android:left="1dp" android:top="4dp" android:right="1dp"> <shape android:shape="oval"> <solid android:color="@color/login_icon_shadow_blue" /> </shape> </item>
<!-- Main icon circle --> <item android:bottom="4dp"> <shape android:shape="oval"> <solid android:color="@color/login_icon_circle_bg" /> </shape> </item>
</layer-list>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <color name="black">#FF000000</color> <color name="white">#FFFFFFFF</color> <color name="splash_background">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="splash_ring_outer">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="splash_ring_inner">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="splash_loader">#F1A000</color> <color name="splash_version">#AEB3B8</color>
<!-- Login Screen Colors --> <color name="login_background">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="login_title_dark">#1A1A2E</color> <color name="login_subtitle_gray">#9E9E9E</color> <color name="login_input_bg">#EEF4FF</color> <color name="login_icon_circle_bg">#D0E8FF</color> <color name="login_icon_tint">#1976D2</color> <color name="login_hint_gray">#BDBDBD</color> <color name="login_button_start">#1565C0</color> <color name="login_button_end">#29B6F6</color> <color name="login_forgot_color">#424242</color> <color name="login_text_input_color">#1A1A2E</color> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <color name="black">#FF000000</color> <color name="white">#FFFFFFFF</color> <color name="splash_background">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="splash_ring_outer">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="splash_ring_inner">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="splash_loader">#F1A000</color> <color name="splash_version">#AEB3B8</color>
<!-- Login Screen Colors --> <color name="login_background">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="login_title_dark">#1A1A2E</color> <color name="login_subtitle_gray">#9E9E9E</color> <color name="login_input_bg">#EEF4FF</color> <color name="login_icon_circle_bg">#D0E8FF</color> <color name="login_icon_shadow_blue">#5529B6F6</color> <color name="login_icon_tint">#1976D2</color> <color name="login_hint_gray">#BDBDBD</color> <color name="login_button_start">#1565C0</color> <color name="login_button_end">#29B6F6</color> <color name="login_forgot_color">#424242</color> <color name="login_text_input_color">#1A1A2E</color> </resources>
